falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 indicates extreme overbought conditions, contradicting the current HOLD signal and suggesting a potential reversal rather than continuation of the pattern.
A confirmed breakdown below 4000 would invalidate the 76% similarity to the bottom_2024_aug pattern, which relied on a defined support level around this price.
A VIX below 15 indicates extreme complacency, falsifying the current HOLD signal by showing no signs of impending volatility or market stress.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
